reach_why: Mostly extends existing debates on search, creativity, and hard-to-vary explanations rather than opening new territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links bounded search failure, human creativity parity, and hidden human priors in evaluation.
falsifiable_why: Counterexamples could operationalize hard-to-vary scoring without tacit priors or distinguish human creativity from bounded search.
explanation: It exposes circularity in judging creativity by search limits plus undefined hard-to-vary standards.
